name: sod gate: verifier output is written to .claude-tdd-pro/verify/<pr-sha>.json (§2 path)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/verify && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/sod-gate.sh" --pr-sha abc123 --verdict concur --emit "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/verify/abc123.json" && test -f .claude-tdd-pro/verify/abc123.json && grep "concur" .claude-tdd-pro/verify/abc123.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
